titles.text: ミントン警部の捜査ファイル　道化師殺人事件
Minton Keibu no Sousa File: Doukeshi Satsujin Jiken

descriptions.text: A summer resort town Brighton stands not far from London, with a small circus troupe becomes the main attraction of the season. Just a day before the premiere clown Charles Dubois is found dead in a shower wagon, the cause of death is a knife strike from the back. Star as the detective who is called from London to resolve this case.
